title: Bring the Soul: The Movie

tmdbOverview: A glimpse into K-pop group BTS’ world away from the stage, featuring intimate group discussions alongside spectacular concert performances from their world tour.
synopsis: Bring the Soul: The Movie (2019) is a music and documentary film from South Korea. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.4 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
